# `CommandArgEntry`

A named positional argument entry in the command schema.

Pairs a user-facing arg name with its ArgSchema descriptor.
The array ordering in CommandSchema.args determines CLI position.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/command.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/command.ts:473`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/command.ts#L473)
